content.thinking: Let me start by exploring the demo namespace to understand what's already there, then create the Service and Ingress resources.

content.text: Let me first check what's already deployed in the demo namespace.

input.description: Get all resources in demo namespace

content.content:

input.command: kubectl -n demo get deployment demo-app -o yaml | grep -A20 'spec:'
input.description: Get deployment spec to find labels and port

content.content:
spec:
  progressDeadlineSeconds: 600
  replicas: 1
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: demo-app
  strategy:
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 25%
      maxUnavailable: 25%
    type: RollingUpdate
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: demo-app
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - sh
        - -c
        - |
          mkdir -p /www
          echo hello > /www/index.html
          httpd -f -p 5678 -h /www
        image: busybox:1.36
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: demo-app
        ports:
        - containerPort: 5678
          name: http
          protocol: TCP
        resources: {}
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Always

tool_use_result.stdout:
